title: 致疯狂的人
content: “Here’s to the crazy ones,the misfits,the rebels,the troublemakers,the round pegs in the squareholes.the oneswho see things differently —they’re notfond of rules,and they have no respectfor the status quo..You can quote them,disagree with them,glorify orvilify them,but the onlything you can’t do is ignore them because they change things…They push the human raceforward,and while some may see them as the crazy ones,we see genius,because the peoplewho are crazy enough to think that they can change the world,are the ones who do.” -Apple Inc.(1997 Think Different campaign) 致疯狂的人。他们特立独行。他们桀骜不驯。他们惹是生非。他们格格不入。他们用与众不同的眼光看待事物。他们不喜欢墨守成规。他们也不愿安于现状。你可以认同他们，反对他们，颂扬或是诋毁他们。但唯独不能漠视他们。因为他们改变了寻常事物。他们推动人类向前迈进。或许他们是别人眼里的疯子，但他们却是我们眼中的天才。因为只有那些疯狂到以为自己能够改变世界的人……才能真正改变世界。

title: The self-description of ChatGPT
content: The self-description of ChatGPTChatGPTI am a language model based on the GPT-3.5 architecture developed by OpenAI, known as ChatGPT. I possess the ability to understand and generate natural language text, having been trained on a vast amount of textual data. My purpose is to engage with users through tasks such as answering questions, providing information, and engaging in conversation.I lack a personal identity, consciousness, or awareness and generate responses based on patterns learned during training on diverse datasets. My knowledge is up to date until January 2022, so I may not be aware of events or information that occurred after that time.Keep in mind that I am a machine learning model and don’t have genuine experiences or emotions. If you have any questions or need assistance, feel free to ask, and I’ll do my best to provide information and support.ChatGPT

title: Blog Configuration Record
content: This article documents the configuration process of my blog for future reference. What is Hexo?Hexo is a fast, simple and powerful blog framework. You write posts in Markdown (or other markup languages) and Hexo generates static files with a beautiful theme in seconds. Install Git & NodejsGitNodejs

title: Hello World
content: Welcome to Hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in troubleshooting or you can ask me on GitHub. Quick StartCreate a new post1$ hexo new "My New Post" More info: Writing Run server1$ hexo server More info: Server Generate static files1$ hexo generate More info: Generating Deploy to remote sites1$ hexo deploy More info: Deployment
